name: eslint-test-spruce
description: Tests for the Spruce Lint packages

scripts.test.fail:
cd src/lint-samples/; for d in fail-*; do echo " 
 
Trying $d
Expecting errors" ; eslint $d; if [ $? -ne 1 ]; then echo FAILED: $d; exit 1; fi; echo "👍
 "; done
scripts.test.pass: cd src/lint-samples/ && echo 'Trying all pass-* files' && eslint pass-* && echo '👍 All pass tests passed'
